comment.body: Everything Trump and Bessent are talking about are a tailwind to equities and Bessent guarded the bond market at the levels Yellen did. Only question for me this week is if investors truly look past NVDA earlier profit warning on China with their retooling of Blackwell for that market. I don't know enough about the space to guess what kind of demand China has for that.
